creator: allcoms@gmail.com
text: I've just tried FreeBSD-11.0-RC1-arm-armv6-BANANAPI.img on my friends Full HD (1920x1080) LG TV using a HDMI to HDMI cable. I can see the u-boot output fine on his TV (something I didn't see on my 4K display) but when it boots the kernel I see garbled junk on the screen for a second or so and then... nothing.
